scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install --include=dev && cd ../client && npm install --include=dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test
scripts.install:hooks: git config core.hooksPath scripts/git-hooks && echo Pre-push hook installed.
